base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rainbow_road — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. Rainbow Road — Special Cup final track. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rainbow Road — Special Cup final track; no-wall space-stage
